---
title: 'Dear Shelley'
date: '2019-06-13T08:22:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4475997736526665742'
blogger_filename: '/2019/06/dear-shelley_13.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

To my Best Friend,<br />
<br />
I love you. I can't be your friend if you aren't. You came in talking marriage then cut me out, then replaced me, then started tagging "him" in my posts. I feel wounded and disrespected.<br />
<br />
If we'd either made a clean break in April; or, you'd kept me in the loop the whole time instead of cutting me out of your life with the occasional vague references to things going on I might be okay today. But I'm not okay. I very not okay.<br />
<br />
You made yourself a part of my world. You and I shared a connection. Future wife or not, we had a solid friendship. Then you discarded me and moved on and pretended like that's okay. That it's okay to develop that level of connection and then move to the vaguest of references to your life.<br />
<br />
We will do life together or we won't. You chose not to let me in. I tried reaching, calling, you've cut me off from access to your life.<br />
<br />
I cannot pretend that this level of "friendship" is okay or keep referencing you as my best friend. If you WERE my best friend, I'd know what's happening in your life... and you would see my hurt and reach out to me instead of discounting it and ignoring it.<br />
<br />
You didn't even respond after today's text. If blocking you on Facebook and telling you that I'm hurting, angry, and bitter isn't enough to make you want to push back and fight for our friendship and ask "Why, how can we make this right? What do you need?" then I'm done. Goodbye.<br />
<br />
I hope you find what you're looking for.<br />
<br />
PS: You're a fucking idiot. You shouldn't BE cloes enough to know anyone's kids or have them over all the time. "Dating" means you go out on dates and go home. You are in relationships, that's not dating. ALL of the drama you are experiencing is your own fucking fault, but you won't even let me know what's really happening, so I can't even tell you that much.<br />
<br />
I don't want to know you anymore. I don't want to see you or hear from you again. Not unless you actually see me and hear me, really see me and hear me.<br />
<br />
I contemplated suicide yesterday, in part because of you. If you who saw me that deeply could reject me, I must really be unlovable.<br />
<br />
Now I realize, it's not me, it's you. You are broken. Your past, two marriages, it all messed you up so completely, that you are self-focused, self-absorbed, and so consumed with all of that that you cannot even SEE that you hurt me, even when I tried to explain. If you LOVED me, even as a friend, and I said I was hurting, you'd pick up the phone an demand to know what's going on... but you didn't. For two months, I've tried... I give up.<br />
<br />
Grievances:<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>You told me you loved me, wanted to marry me, talked about eloping, talked moving, talked about how you couldn't wait to kiss me... then flipped instantly and disappeared.&nbsp;</li>
<li>You cut me completely out of communication, and then dropped vague hints of your life with no real information after two months of talking daily and knowing everything.&nbsp;</li>
<li>You ignored me constantly, barely replied at times, and often ignored the important stuff and replied to the inconsequential pieces.&nbsp;</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings. Instead of acknowledging my hurt, even after telling you what I needed to hear, you couldn't respond with it. You told me I was being "dramatic".&nbsp;</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings and our friendship, by sending me a picture of the new guy and saying "Don't be mad", which means you knew I would be.</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings and our friendship, by tagging the guy who replaced me in my posts. Even the sensitive ones.</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings and our friendship, by saying he didn't replace me, then telling me you had essentially the SAME relationship with him you had with me. What do you think replace means?</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings and our friendship, by ignoring my pleas to talk this out, ignoring my several attempts to work it out, and basically just ignoring me for two months.&nbsp;</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings and our friendship, by saying you wanted me in your life, but never actually let me in it.&nbsp;</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings and our friendship, by never calling or initiating contact. You claim to be so busy. If you have time for movie nights, and ice cream dates, you could pick up the damn phone and call me once every other week at least. You aren't too busy, you just didn't prioritize our friendship over anything else. It didn't take that much effort to work me into almost everything you did for the first two months. You just simply didn't choose to try to do that when you were through using me as your rebound guy.</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings and our friendship, by commenting on my posts with agreement when many of them were (in my heart) directed at you. I wanted you to see. You can't see. You're blind to me. I now choose to be blind to you.</li>
<li>You DISRESPECTED my feelings and our friendship, by not even responding to me in our previous chats and again today (06/12/2019). You couldn't even say "I'm sorry you are hurting. I'm sorry for any part I played." Nothing? No response? Really?! This isn't how a friend responds. I give up.</li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
There are positive things that came from knowing you, but currently, I feel the negatives far outweighed them. In this moment, I wish I'd never met you.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Then I remember the good two months in the beginning. I remember that I love you. I know you are broken and I want to forgive everything and run to save you. But in overlooking all the painful things you do out of "love", I've wounded myself too much. I wanted to kill myself.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Then I realized, I made you my idol. You had a place in my life over God. I cared more about your affirmation than His.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
BTW, Affirmation and Validation are very different. You know how to Affirm. You SUCK at Validation. Learn that before you get married.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
BTW, did you notice that you latched on to a Scott? First, you marry Steve, and your brother's name is Steve. Now you latch on to a Scott, and your brother's name is Scott. Not an accident. This will hurt you.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
I have been a Puppy Dog, waiting at the door wagging my tail every time I hear you voice or see your face through the window. Instead of feeding me, you give me scraps. I happily accepted them, because it meant I could touch you, just a little.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Well... I am not a Puppy Dog, I am a MAN! I deserve WAY better than the scraps you toss my way. I deserve better than you, or the you that you are today.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
I hope you find peace. I hope you find a way out of the turmoil, most of which is self-inflicted.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
I have to go now, because I can't watch you from a distance. It's literally killing me.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
I hope we can be real friends again, but if not. Please know that I love you despite everything above, and in spite of myself. I love you. It was nice to have been yours for two months.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Bye.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Darrell, your former Best Friend, former almost husband.&nbsp;</div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-154048-d72844138577.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-154048-734c26c2da4e.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150337-92d61122066d.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150337-bbdb551ab8b0.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150334-6f595d88c188.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150334-c5df8f63fb04.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150329-5461fa184093.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150329-5f3087d1902b.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150322-51fcce1197bb.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150322-152708ee8c14.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150313-b33e5e9ee863.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150313-351b196af3c0.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150308-ef96b9136e01.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150308-5e830c9fb89d.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150304-9e4465e8358f.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150304-ac3fea658846.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150259-012c765d8dd3.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150259-c4c1fdc4b577.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150252-7c06abc5742d.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150252-7c5a0f2d9844.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150245-daa8e7898b27.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150245-82919f31f0e0.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150240-e6916d8fdfec.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150240-99414af5f2e3.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150235-e380b11cec70.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150235-c133ca2fa4e7.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150230-8f73277664b1.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150230-bdb01d35bfb3.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150224-f5a28739eea3.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-150224-481eb33369f2.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-135942-5d7d33a5ba24.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-135942-7eb23fc1edcd.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-134108-541c40b84883.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-134108-68218fbc7120.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-133936-84a687ddd5e6.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-133936-eb5ce8aad803.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-133929-53915431c713.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-133929-8f46b288acaf.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-133924-b95f307d0a70.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-133924-e19c385dea1e.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-124234-dfa2e4287f2d.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-124234-cac71f5c8714.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-124231-1fce833bf389.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-124231-60b743194772.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-112903-d80d6095a242.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-112903-dd3fa9d3400c.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-112900-8987b495fe05.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-112900-deb438e697b6.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-112852-a2020c641dd4.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-112852-d866451c25d1.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022100-e95031011d4d.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022100-7315b3e45f9e.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022053-109c5fd5c398.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022053-b3c6f9e3ec28.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022048-d1baedc03382.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022048-e45f29ffcba9.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022036-c5f671082ced.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022036-b7532599f876.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022030-cddfc1813612.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022030-005a82b7a49c.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022025-40e68f34f718.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022025-09636ab86e5a.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022020-f8de42d2b368.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022020-ecc5092018b0.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022014-23c3341373be.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022014-a34cb514d2d9.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022009-2bb32b1a701c.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022009-cd6ecb4e5abd.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022004-09abc6de92e1.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-022004-bbecc7c87af8.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021958-9dfddf830a31.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021958-8fc3779ba0e2.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021953-128e6fa874b1.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021953-6918ea16aee4.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021948-74003453e1da.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021948-618854cb7d0d.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021944-de8b4582c017.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021944-6ef50aba96e6.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021938-50a4a2011d90.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021938-e6118679e60e.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021932-cae8c48e0dcc.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021932-61769dda03a6.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021926-062b4dbaf166.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021926-5379b4427dcd.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021920-945b3e2e2a25.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021920-93d3b3bac739.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021914-36605ee573f8.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021914-b389cdeb35b7.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021909-0f239d79d239.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021909-1d7c70307b3e.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021903-9052422c895d.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021903-606f1f778a7b.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021858-c8f1563bfc17.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021858-593bfad3e1b9.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021852-60d94fded0c5.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021852-9be3c2f465de.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021848-b00c806dcfd8.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021848-2eb073ca9939.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021842-5cf3762eddae.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021842-30253d524b3a.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021838-d4ca616e3f97.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021838-13623478dbc4.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021833-9752b7956034.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021833-fc42124df78d.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021828-e7adc581ff0d.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021828-3f18eb4a30a9.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021821-b42aa27919e5.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021821-b2a2942a13a4.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021815-8f6ce012b5a7.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021815-68dcf5f92b73.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021737-e8b2cb659064.png" imageanchor="1"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021737-e8b2cb659064.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021733-b632dbb1fec0.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021733-6cfde73508e2.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021727-3711ef72c7cd.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021727-8d1379562762.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021723-e24e9489166b.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021723-a31c2a34e801.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021718-fa8fa3209c4d.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021718-99795165ca97.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021707-83f324126720.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021707-5b52edfae397.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021701-3c7c5c01c2e3.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021701-83c27f36f7d4.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021657-efc534e8021f.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021657-2d6007668e4f.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021651-eff3cdb857af.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021651-b62262204a37.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021642-6796a6ef3163.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021642-89dc55970384.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021636-4249cd90ed03.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021636-5ec1026cddc5.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021630-98cd07272419.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021630-c391647f7ffc.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021626-b384487d1111.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021626-e231ef936865.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021617-f0c31a36014f.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021617-0b7b34ad8a45.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021613-12917b3582c1.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021613-acb6adc6d421.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021606-7660892d7a34.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021606-280a48179e82.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021558-7ef2df1b3791.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="900" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/screenshot-20190612-021558-96489e00b0c7.png" width="180" /></a></div>
<br />
